description: Skill description templates — controls skill UI layout, icon, description text, damage display, and synergy tooltip lines. Referenced by the skilldesc column in Skills.txt.

skilldesc.description: Skill description identifier, referenced by Skills.txt skilldesc column

SkillPage.description: Skill tree page (1 = left, 2 = middle, 3 = right, 0 = not shown)

SkillRow.description: Skill tree row position (0-6, top to bottom)

SkillColumn.description: Skill tree column position (0-2, left to right)

ListRow.description: Skill list display row for right-click skill menu

ListPool.description: Skill list pool grouping for right-click skill menu

IconCel.description: Skill icon cell index in the skill icon DC6 file

str name.description: String table key for skill display name

str short.description: String table key for short skill description

str long.description: String table key for long/detailed skill description

str alt.description: String table key for alternate skill description

str mana.description: String table key for mana cost display text

descdam.description: Damage display mode (1=attack, 2=kick, 3=throw, 4-24=various skill damage types)

descatt.description: Attack rating display mode for character screen

desctexta1.description: Description line 1 text key A (string table)

desctextb1.description: Description line 1 text key B (string table)

dsc2line1.description: Current level description line 1 display function

dsc2texta1.description: Current level description line 1 text key A

dsc2textb1.description: Current level description line 1 text key B

dsc2calca1.description: Current level description line 1 calculation A

dsc2calcb1.description: Current level description line 1 calculation B
